goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available for agricultural research purposes
Explore available units in the length category for land distance measurements
Convert a land area measurement from acres to square meters for comparative analysis
Convert temperature data from Celsius to Fahrenheit for climate data comparison

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, focused on precise measurements and data analysis for academic research.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knowledgeable about agricultural practices and rural technology adoption but unfamiliar with specific unit conversion tool names or APIs. Knows metric and imperial unit systems from academic coursework.

end_condition: The user has successfully converted the relevant agricultural measurements and can proceed with their comparative analysis of technology adoption in rural communities.
